body: original_game_data.md requires original ROM data (character stats, hitbox sizes, catch window frames), but data source is not specified. ROM disassembly? Community wiki? Manual measurement?
title: [RISK-01] Data source for original game data undefined

body: assets/ directory only lists structure, no production pipeline defined. Hand-drawn pixels or extract from original? 8 teams x 6 chars x many anim frames = massive workload.
title: [RISK-02] Art asset pipeline undefined

body: Core rules undefined in GDD: serve mechanism, ball ownership after ground hit, outfield player range, outfield kill revive rule, time limit and draw handling.
title: [RISK-03] Match rules details missing

body: World Cup mode is multi-stage. Mobile users can be interrupted anytime. No auto-save design exists in project structure.
title: [RISK-04] No save/load system

body: touch_controls.gd only handles touch. Dev needs keyboard/gamepad, VS mode needs local 2P input. No unified input manager to abstract input sources.
title: [RISK-05] No unified input management layer

body: 48 characters (8x6), each with unique special throw trajectory. special_throws.gd single file may not scale. 5 days estimate too tight.
title: [RISK-06] Special throw system complexity underestimated

body: character_controller.gd mentions state machine but no state list or transition rules. States: Idle, Run, Jump, Throw, Catch, Dodge, Hit, KnockBack, GetUp, Dead, InOutfieldTransition...
title: [RISK-07] Character state machine not detailed

body: Total ~48 days for 48 chars, 8 teams, multi-mode, cross-platform game is short. High risk: AI 5d, Art 7d, Mobile adapt 5d.
title: [RISK-08] Time estimates overly optimistic

body: No unit/integration/QA test plan. Collision and damage calculations need automated verification.
title: [RISK-09] No testing strategy

body: NES 256x240 vs mobile 16:9/19.5:9/4:3. No scaling strategy defined. Godot stretch_mode/stretch_aspect must be configured early.
title: [RISK-10] Resolution adaptation strategy undefined

body: No scene transition manager. Original has pre-match anim, team intro, halftime. Not reflected in project structure.
title: [RISK-11] No scene transition management

body: NES remake has copyright risk. Original by Technos Japan, rights held by Arc System Works. Must clarify: tribute (original assets) vs direct remake.
title: [RISK-12] Copyright compliance risk

body: GDD mentions Bean Ball mode but no rules described. Cannot implement an undefined mode.
title: [RISK-13] Bean Ball mode rules undefined

body: .gitignore for Godot 4 needed (.godot/, *.import). No CI/CD plan. (.gitignore now created)
title: [RISK-14] Version control config missing

body: Game title in Japanese, target mobile may be global. No localization strategy mentioned.
title: [RISK-15] No localization strategy

body: Only local 2P mentioned. If online needed later, architecture must consider input/state sync now.
title: [RISK-16] Online multiplayer extensibility not considered
